reviews.review_title: Why am i spawning outside the map!!!
reviews.review_description: xvxc gvbgngh
Easy to load in, fun quick matches and good graphics (even shadows.) genuine masterpiece.
like it
I've already written a review for this on steam, so let me make this quick, it is the greatest game I have ever played.
Yes

reviews.review_title: I shed tears while playing this game
reviews.review_description: This is game of all time. Without a doubt in my mind this game has changed my life for the better just the craftsmanship from the "blobby" alone should be enough for game of the year but even then the extra graphics like the sky and of course the tennis aspect have officially changed everything I thought I once knew about gaming. Even the settings menu and the voice lines are some of the absolute peak of their categories. Truly nothing could come close let alone beat this game when it comes to the true arts of tennis. 5/5 stars super blobbtastic
Love it. Anyone hating on this doesn’t understand the simplicity of hitting a ball over a net (or into oblivion) over and over for eternity. Couldn’t ask for more.
Why is such a basic and unpolished game on the store. Please developers focus your time on more worthwhile VR projects!

So great game all in all but sometime when I’m playing the force of my hit feels like I’m a a bodybuilder when playing, do not like that part because it takes about ten times for me to hit the ball with the perfect amount of force to the blob and that it is way too easy to not hit the ball back to the blob, but hit it completely out of the beach! Please fix these bugs! Thank you for reading this!
It crashes your oculus
I dont know if it is hard to play or what but this game lagged my quest 2 so dont download it.

UPDATED REVIEW

After playing this game again, I found that you can change the racket rotation by hitting the button with three lines on it on the controller. The thing is, that it seems like it still doesn’t really fix it.

I’ve been able to hit it back to blobby on hit #2, but it’s only happened few times. I haven’t gotten to hit #3. 

I’ve found the absolute main issue after playing for a little while.
Ball Physics.

Yes, the physics on the ball on hit #2 and beyond is pretty bad. I’ll hit the ball back to blobby and it goes way to the right (nearly off of the map)  instead of on the right side of the court is a specific example.

This game has 2MD Vr football potential, and I hope that I could get a response please.

If this gets fixed, I’ll gladly raise my review. 

                            Thanks

Update March 15
I think that the reason people dislike this is because of the difficulty. I have only gotten to hit #3 2 times. I think that maybe a bigger tennis ball would really help. The other issue is that I have to awkwardly turn my wrist and praying to hit it when blobby hits a ball low to the ground. It is impossible to hit it. I don’t know if this can be fixed but I think even just where they don’t hit the ball below eye level could maybe fix it. I have given another star just for a helpful developer. Thank you for replying and attempting to help, I appreciate it.

developer_response.body:
Hey, I am sorry that you are having trouble hitting the ball back. The problem is that I can't really reproduce an issue with that. It's quite hard to not hit the ball too hard due to the lack of physical feedback, but I can play the ball back and forth several times while sitting by now and can do more than 10 if I stand up and actually try.

What might be a problem is guardian showing up, as that currently seems to cause major frame drops with a lot of games including mine and will effect the ball physics in bad ways.

reviews.review_title: DO NOT DOWNLOAD WASTE OF TIME
reviews.review_description: For starters the interaction between the ball and the racket are horrible. You can’t not return the ball back after you serve, and the serving mechanics are not any better at all. You have to hit a forehand to even think about hitting the ball of the net. Wasted 30 minutes on the game trying to find a redeeming quality of it, none was found.

reviews.review_title: Fun game but hard to play
reviews.review_description:
First, thank you for this fun tennis like game.  Please continue to improve the game play. Very often I hit the ball too far or off to the sides. Unable to play for more than 5 hits. 
Love to play this for longer time if possible,  it is a fun and relaxing game to play.
Thank you
I really recommend you to play this game it's really good. It's a really good game to make time pass by.

reviews.review_title: This game is weird! But addictive!
reviews.review_description:
This game have a very bad graphics. It’s look like the animator draw the sky first and after this he took a lot of drugs and draw blobby, blobby is just a red circle! He even don’t have a racket!
When I play this game I suffer so much I don't enjoy it for one second. But I can’t stop playing this game! Blobby comes in my nightmares, I can’t stop thinking about blobby please help me!
I have never experienced such a beautiful game the gameplay is infinite as well as the fun it may be unfinished but WOW it hits hard like the ball against the racket.
I for some reason cant download it.
bad experience weird physics

This game isn’t just an unfinished, app lab game.
This game is a breath of fresh air. An escape from the horrors of our reality. Blobby tennis is a masterpiece. The way the blob goes “hah” when you score, is so beautifully implemented. Not to mention the settings menu is a phenomenal touch. You can adjust your racket angle, as well as turn music off. That’s all you need to do. After that, you can play to your heart’s content. Blobby tennis is the reason I am still here writing this review. Never in my entire life have I experienced such perfection.
